hero.title: Daily Word Challenge
hero.description: Discover one deterministic daily word, explore vocabulary, and track learning progress in your browser.

differences.title: Build vocabulary one day at a time
differences.description: Daily Word Challenge combines a deterministic daily word with a searchable vocabulary collection and local progress.

items.title: Discover
items.description: Meet the same focused daily word as every learner for that date.

items.title: Learn
items.description: Review pronunciation, meaning, part of speech, and an example.

items.title: Complete
items.description: Mark words learned today and build a current learning streak.

feel.title: A focused daily vocabulary routine
feel.description: The challenge keeps today’s word, the complete collection, and local learning progress together.

items.title: Meet today’s word
items.description: Start with one word selected deterministically for the date.

items.title: Explore vocabulary
items.description: Search 20 bundled words and filter them by difficulty.

items.title: Build consistency
items.description: Maintain a streak by learning at least one word each day.

audiences.title: Who uses Daily Word Challenge
audiences.description: Useful for anyone building vocabulary through a manageable daily routine.

items.title: Students
items.description: Grow vocabulary through focused daily learning.

items.title: Writers
items.description: Explore words that expand written expression.

items.title: Curious learners
items.description: Add one practical learning moment to every day.

resourceSection.title: Daily vocabulary essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed to discover, learn, and complete a daily word challenge.

items.title: Bundled words
items.description: Explore 20 words across three difficulty levels.

items.title: Daily challenge
items.description: Receive one deterministic word for the local date.

items.title: Local progress
items.description: Store learned word IDs and current streak progress in this browser.

groupedSection.title: Discover and complete daily words
groupedSection.description: Use one browser-only workflow for vocabulary exploration and consistent progress.

items.name: Daily selection
items.description: Start with the word selected for today.

items.name: Search and filter
items.description: Find words by text, meaning, part of speech, or difficulty.

items.name: Learned progress
items.description: Mark or undo words learned today.

items.name: Browser streak
items.description: Track consecutive days with local date-based progress.

technicalSection.title: Designed for browser vocabulary learning
technicalSection.description: Daily Word Challenge follows the shared Ansiversa browser-first reference architecture.
items: Deterministic daily selection with date-based browser progress.

finalCta.title: Learn one new word every day
finalCta.description: Open Daily Word Challenge to discover today’s word and build your vocabulary in the browser.
